name: claude-management
description: Skills, hooks, and agents for managing Claude Code memory files as a self-improvement harness: splitting heavy CLAUDE.md into on-demand rules (rulify), generating token-efficient module-level documentation (claudify), routing information to the correct storage location (remember), automating session closing with commits and context documentation (end-session), mining harvested session transcripts for recurring flows worth stabilizing as project skills or rules (stabilize), and suggestion-only hooks that detect the right moment to invoke each skill, with a practice-verifier gate so repetition never outranks correctness.
